moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is underway in the USA, Canada, and Mexico, with group stage matches continuing this week, including England playing Panama on June 27.

angles.name: Global Footy Fever
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is officially in full swing across North America! Who are you backing to go all the way?

angles.name: England's Next Challenge
angles.copy: England fans, mark your calendars! The Three Lions face Panama next on June 27th in the World Cup group stage. Get ready!

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival, featuring headliners Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure, is concluding this weekend, running from June 18-21.

angles.name: Festival Finale
angles.copy: It's the final day for Isle of Wight Festival 2026! What's been your highlight from Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, The Cure and more?

angles.name: Weekend Vibe Check
angles.copy: Festival season in full swing! Isle of Wight Festival is wrapping up this weekend - who did you catch live?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Live in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green is buzzing with TRNSMT Festival, running June 19-21, with headliners Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi performing this weekend.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Rocks
angles.copy: TRNSMT is taking over Glasgow Green this weekend! Who's ready for Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi?

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: From indie anthems to pop hits, TRNSMT Festival is the place to be in Scotland this weekend. What's on your setlist?

moments.title: Parklife Festival Manchester
moments.blurb: Parklife Festival is happening this weekend, June 20-21, bringing major acts to Manchester for a huge two-day event.

angles.name: Manchester's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Parklife is ON in Manchester this weekend! Who's heading to Heaton Park for two days of incredible music?

angles.name: Festival Energy
angles.copy: The beats are dropping at Parklife 2026! Manchester is the place to be for festival vibes today and tomorrow.

moments.title: Bristol Sounds Next Week
moments.blurb: Bristol Sounds returns to Canons Marsh Amphitheatre next week, running from June 26-27, with a lineup of exciting artists.

angles.name: Bristol's Summer Stage
angles.copy: Get ready, Bristol! Bristol Sounds takes over Canons Marsh Amphitheatre next week, June 26-27. Who are you hoping to see?

angles.name: Midweek Gigs
angles.copy: Looking ahead to next week's live music? Bristol Sounds has you covered with two days of great acts!

moments.title: Outbreak Fest in Manchester
moments.blurb: Outbreak Fest, the hardcore, punk, and alternative music festival, is set for June 26-28 at BEC Arena in Manchester.

angles.name: Hardcore in Manc
angles.copy: Manchester's BEC Arena gets loud next week! Outbreak Fest brings the best in hardcore, punk, and alternative music, June 26-28.

angles.name: Alt Music Alert
angles.copy: Ready for some raw energy? Outbreak Fest is set to ignite Manchester next weekend. Who's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Blenheim Palace Festival begins on June 27, featuring an incredible lineup including Katy Perry, Teddy Swims, Pete Tong Ibiza Classics, Alanis Morissette, and Michael Bublé.

angles.name: Palace Party
angles.copy: An epic week ahead at Blenheim Palace! Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Michael Bublé and more are set to perform from June 27th. Who are you most excited for?

angles.name: Star-Studded Lineup
angles.copy: Alanis Morissette at a palace? Yes please! Blenheim Palace Festival starts next Saturday. What's your favourite Alanis track?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin Soon
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 are set to begin on Monday, June 29, running until July 12 at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Tennis Season in London
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off on Monday, June 29. Who are you rooting for this year?

angles.name: Grand Slam Anticipation
angles.copy: The grass courts of Wimbledon await! The world's most prestigious tennis tournament begins in just over a week.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Lionel Richie
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Easy' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday today, June 20, 2026.

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the incredible Lionel Richie! What's your all-time favourite track from the king of smooth soul?

angles.name: Iconic Hits
angles.copy: 'Hello', 'Dancing on the Ceiling', 'All Night Long' - so many classics! Join us in wishing Lionel Richie a very happy birthday!

moments.title: Lana Del Rey Turns 41
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her cinematic and melancholic style, celebrates her 41st birthday tomorrow, June 21, 2026.

angles.name: Queen of Melancholy
angles.copy: Tomorrow, June 21st, we celebrate the unique artistry of Lana Del Rey as she turns 41! What's your favourite Lana track?

angles.name: Early Summer Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to wish Lana Del Rey a happy 41st birthday tomorrow! Her influence on music is undeniable.

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrates her 73rd birthday on Sunday, June 22, 2026.

angles.name: 80s Pop Legend
angles.copy: Girls (and guys) just want to have fun! Sending early birthday wishes to the incredible Cyndi Lauper, who turns 73 on Sunday!

angles.name: Timeless Tracks
angles.copy: From 'Time After Time' to 'True Colors', Cyndi Lauper's music is iconic. Happy 73rd birthday to her this weekend!

moments.title: Fantasia Barrino Turns 42
moments.blurb: American Idol winner and Grammy-winning R&B singer Fantasia Barrino, known for her powerful vocals, celebrates her 42nd birthday on June 30, 2026.

angles.name: R&B Powerhouse
angles.copy: Mark your calendars for June 30th! The incredibly talented Fantasia Barrino celebrates her 42nd birthday. What's your favourite Fantasia song?

angles.name: Idol to Icon
angles.copy: From American Idol champion to Grammy winner, Fantasia Barrino has had an amazing career. Happy 42nd birthday to her at the end of the month!

moments.title: Mike Tyson's 60th Birthday
moments.blurb: Boxing legend Mike Tyson, former undisputed world heavyweight champion, will celebrate his 60th birthday on June 30, 2026.

angles.name: Iron Mike at 60
angles.copy: The Baddest Man on the Planet turns 60! Happy birthday wishes to boxing icon Mike Tyson on June 30th.

angles.name: Sporting Legend
angles.copy: One of the most formidable athletes in history, Mike Tyson, celebrates his 60th at the end of the month. What's your favourite Tyson moment?

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs tomorrow, June 21, 2026.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for maximum daylight! The Summer Solstice is tomorrow, June 21st, bringing us the longest day of the year.

angles.name: Summer is Here
angles.copy: Officially welcoming summer! Tomorrow marks the Summer Solstice. How are you making the most of the extra daylight?
